examples: These oils may cause irritation to sensitive skins.
He tried not to let his irritation show as he blinked in the glare of the television lights.
If the irritation is severe enough, a sleeping person will arouse, clear the airway, then resume breathing and likely return to sleep.
Unlike his predecessor, William Rehnquist, Roberts rarely shows irritation or frustration on the bench.
Tony worked for nothing, or for very little, groaning in wordless irritation as he toiled.
